label: Cost Optimization Pressure
description: Cost-optimizing agents compress margins by eliminating process-dependent value extraction

causal_translation.trigger_text: Agents optimize for cost and your model extracts significant value from process steps (>40).
causal_translation.rule_text: Cost-optimizing agents eliminate unnecessary process steps, reducing process-dependent revenue.
causal_translation.shift_text: Higher process value extraction means more revenue at risk from optimization pressure.
causal_translation.effect_text: Margin reduced proportionally to process dependency — up to 30% reduction at maximum process extraction.
